info.title: Spora API
info.description: HTTP API for the Spora AI agent orchestration platform. Paths are derived from `Spora\Core\RouteDefinitions`; body schemas are added incrementally via `#[\OpenApi\...]` attributes on controllers.

cookieAuth.description: Session cookie issued by `delight-im/auth`. Required by `AuthMiddleware`.
cookieAuth.name: PHPSESSID

csrfToken.description: CSRF token issued alongside the session. Required by `CsrfMiddleware` on every write method.
csrfToken.name: X-CSRF-Token
